unresolvedTextByHash.1b4c1b0c47877cf79965d5cb0bad2850d96f5d14: Farewell [?], may Arengeesus shine down upon you.
unresolvedTextByHash.5da99bc16dba0128caee9f11e1d30bb1440cdc4d: Ah these robes keeps me holy, I must remain holy when praying to the God of Luck, [?].
unresolvedTextByHash.78db91d12e203a51b58b9603f29c7089e06019a9: I've come to Kourend in search of luck, [?]. I seek many fortunes and as you know you need luck to find fortune!
unresolvedTextByHash.b86edaf4d0d3ae42583ff547178f8df0b55776ed: Perhaps working hard is merely a form of praise to the God of luck, [?].
